seoTitle: Capella vs Captains Mountain — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Capella and Captains Mountain. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Capella vs Captains Mountain: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Capella and Captains Mountain.
heading: Capella vs Captains Mountain — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Capella, Queensland and Captains Mountain, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Capella has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Captains Mountain (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Capella or Captains Mountain safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Capella has a flood risk score of 28/100, while Captains Mountain scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Capella scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Captains Mountain scores 47/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Capella or Captains Mountain?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Capella has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.13% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
